badge_assigned_cases: {count, plural, one {# assigned case} other {# assigned cases}}
btn_add_details: Add details, cases, co-teachers, students & registration code
btn_add_n_students: {count, plural, =0 {Add student} one {Add # student} other {Add # students}}
card_enrolled_students: {count, plural, one {# enrolled student} other {# enrolled students}}
confirm_delete_msg: Delete "{name}"? This removes the class grouping and its members' access to it. Members' accounts and their own data are not affected.
empty_library_no_cases: No cases in the library yet. Create cases under Case Manager first, then assign them here.
empty_no_cases_assigned: No cases assigned — pick from the library with “Add cases”.
empty_no_coteachers: No co-teachers — add colleagues to share this class.
empty_no_courses: No courses yet. Create one above.
empty_no_students_hint: Add them above by username/email, in bulk, or share the registration code.
empty_no_students_tenant: No eligible students in this tenant yet.
empty_no_users_tenant: No other users in this tenant to add as co-teachers.
error_passing_score_range: Passing score must be between 0 and 100
error_start_before_end: Start date must be on or before the end date
help_allow_retakes: Students may re-attempt an assigned case after a completed run.
help_directory_fallback: {label}. Your account can’t browse the user directory (admin-only), so enter identifiers directly — the server resolves each one in your tenant.
help_owner: The class owner is always a teacher and can’t be removed here.
help_passing_score: Score (%) a student needs to count a case as passed in reports. Leave blank for no threshold.
help_policy_info: Policy is recorded on the class and used by cohort reporting; it does not retroactively change already completed sessions.
help_reg_code: Students enter this under My Profile → Join a course. Anyone with this code can enrol — rotate or disable it if it leaks.
help_require_debrief: A case counts as complete only after the student finishes the post-case discussion.
label_add_coteachers_lines: Add co-teachers by username or email — one per line
label_add_students_lines: Add students by username or email — one per line
label_cases_selected: {count, plural, one {# case selected} other {# cases selected}}
label_generate_join_now: Generate a join code now (registration code)
placeholder_add_student: Add student by username or email
placeholder_objectives: What should students be able to do by the end of this class? One objective per line.
subtitle_courses: Group students, assign cases, and share registration codes.
toast_coteachers_added_with_failed: {count, plural, one {Added # co-teacher} other {Added # co-teachers}}, {failed} failed.
toast_select_one_student: Select or enter at least one student
